audit: Independent source-fidelity audit (general-purpose subagent) caught origin-laundering in v0.1. Corrected. Only axiom-grounded probes are in the sealable ESDE-axiom set.
source_gap: The roadmap §7.2 'ESDE v3.0 Formal' (限定化 L / Ω domain-selector / open-world 3-state / §8 boundary) is NOT located in any frozen source — grep found no 限定化/VΩ/NΩ/open-world/KNOWN_OUT anywhere in the ESDE or Aruism repos. Probes needing that material are marked SOURCE_GAP (need the real v3.0 Formal doc or a Taka-authored definition, cf. AFE existence-defense/destructive-creation gaps).
builder_contamination_limitation: Builder (Claude) has seen VAL/SEALED incidents + authored the breakthrough_structures. Sealable probes are axiom-derived general primitives, not incident-tuned. SEALED results read with this caveat + external verification.

sealable_axiom_grounded_probes.source_axiom: Aru (有る, undifferentiated origin) + E (同定, identify units) — CORRECTED from v0.1's non-existent '§1 限定化'
sealable_axiom_grounded_probes.structural_function: Inspect what was cut out of the undifferentiated field and declared 'the existence/unit' here; test whether the individuation rule itself is producing the conclusion rather than the phenomenon.
sealable_axiom_grounded_probes.primary_question: What was selected/cut out as the unit or 'existence' in this frame, and could the individuation rule itself be generating the observed result?

sealable_axiom_grounded_probes.source_axiom: §2.2 Axis Emergence (軸は定義されず連結から創発)
sealable_axiom_grounded_probes.structural_function: Hold the axis as a changeable object, not a fixed premise; test whether an alternative incident-grounded axis reorganizes the same observations.
sealable_axiom_grounded_probes.primary_question: Which axis is held as a fixed premise, and is there another axis grounded in the incident under which the same observations reorganize?

sealable_axiom_grounded_probes.structural_function: Among entities treated as independent, test whether one is changing another's condition (a nonzero linkage L(A,B)).
sealable_axiom_grounded_probes.primary_question: Which entities are treated as independent, and is one of them silently changing the condition or generation of another?

sealable_axiom_grounded_probes.source_axiom: T 三項創発 + §3.1 (A<->B latent, A<->B<->C manifest; C = history/context/observer as MANIFESTER 顕在化の担い手)
sealable_axiom_grounded_probes.structural_function: For current hypothesis A + evidence B, test whether a decision-relevant THIRD term C (history / context / observer) is absent, leaving the phenomenon only latent. NOTE: axiom T's observer MANIFESTS a latent relation (§3.2 '監視でなく顕在化の担い手') — this probe surfaces the missing manifesting third term, NOT an observer that fabricates results.
sealable_axiom_grounded_probes.primary_question: Given the current hypothesis and its evidence, what third term (history, context, or observer) is missing from the frame that would let a currently-latent relation become visible?
forbidden: forcing a third term with no incident basis
using the observer as a source of fabricated results (that inverts axiom T)

sealable_axiom_grounded_probes.structural_function: Test whether the current move is only an improvement along the existing gradient (∇F); look for an orthogonal-direction candidate (C⊥∇F) that reaches the decision objective via a qualitatively new structure.
sealable_axiom_grounded_probes.primary_question: Is the proposed next step just refining the current gradient, and is there an orthogonal move (a qualitatively different structure) closer to the actual decision objective?

provisional_probes_flagged.source_axiom: ε (E = f(I) + ε, ε≠0; 誤差は創造性の源) + §5 (平均で潰さず拾う) — re-grounded from v0.1 FE-OMEGA's non-existent VΩ/NΩ
provisional_probes_flagged.structural_function: Test whether a residual/discarded/averaged-away set (ε) is being treated as negligible when it is load-bearing — do not erase what the description leaves out.
provisional_probes_flagged.primary_question: What residual or discarded set has been averaged/ignored, and is it actually load-bearing for the decision rather than negligible error?

reasons: INVERTS axiom T (T's observer MANIFESTS a latent relation '顕在化の担い手'; the probe used the observer as a fabricator of results — the opposite claim)
fabricated non-existent 'cause-types C/E' (source C=創造, E=同定; the probe re-labeled them)
LEAKED the named hard-core targets via the enumeration 'born/windowed/built/partitioned/replaced' (built->HBB-15, replaced->HBB-20, partitioned->HBB-27)
rejected.honest_note: The 観察が結果を作る idea is an ESDE FAILURE-RECORD cause-type (empirical, TIER-C), NOT an axiom. A legitimate observer-artifact probe would be ESDE-EMPIRICAL-derived (from ESDE_失敗の記録 cause-type C), generic-worded, marked with overfit caveat — NOT axiom-grounded. Deferred to Taka: observer-position was Taka's suggestion; compiling it honestly requires the failure-record as source + accepting overfit risk to {15,20,27}.

source_gap_probes.need: 'ESDE v3.0 Formal' domain-selector Ω (VΩ/NΩ) — not located

source_gap_probes.note: open-world 3-state / threshold-binding / FORMALIZATION_NOT_BOUND is the roadmap §8 + EGL's own acquisition-boundary discipline, NOT in esde_axioms_unified. Legitimate as an EGL-DISCIPLINE layer, but must be labeled EGL-derived, not ESDE-axiom-derived. Deferred.
